message:
feat: enhance spectral fingerprinting with quality factor, centroid, sample buffer, proptest (wa-283h4.9)

Add missing pieces to spectral.rs: peak quality factor Q (f/bandwidth_3dB),
spectral centroid, circular SampleBuffer, SpectralClassifier stateful wrapper,
PSD cosine similarity, signal generators, and 5 proptest properties. Fix
classification order (flatness before peaks) and add peak clustering to handle
Hann window side lobes. 47 tests total (42 unit + 5 proptest).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
